mapper.sql: run_id, session_id, workspace_id, status, storage_mode, status_version, client_request_id, producer_linux_server_id, execution_node_id_snapshot, opencode_process_id_snapshot, root_remote_session_id, dispatch_message_id, assistant_summary_message_id, trace_id, created_at, updated_at, details_expires_at, source_type, source_ref_id, triggered_by_user_id, agent_id, model_id
mapper.insert: insert into runs( run_id, session_id, workspace_id, status, storage_mode, status_version, client_request_id, producer_linux_server_id, execution_node_id_snapshot, opencode_process_id_snapshot, root_remote_session_id, dispatch_message_id, assistant_summary_message_id, trace_id, created_at, updated_at, details_expires_at, source_type, source_ref_id, triggered_by_user_id, agent_id, model_id ) values ( #{row.runId}, #{row.sessionId}, #{row.workspaceId}, #{row.status}, #{row.storageMode}, #{row.statusVersion}, #{row.clientRequestId}, #{row.producerLinuxServerId}, #{row.executionNodeIdSnapshot}, #{row.opencodeProcessIdSnapshot}, #{row.rootRemoteSessionId}, #{row.dispatchMessageId}, #{row.assistantSummaryMessageId}, #{row.traceId}, #{row.createdAt}, #{row.updatedAt}, #{row.detailsExpiresAt}, #{row.sourceType}, #{row.sourceRefId}, #{row.triggeredByUserId}, #{row.agentId}, #{row.modelId} ) on conflict(session_id, client_request_id) do nothing

merge into runs as target using (values ( #{row.runId}, #{row.sessionId}, #{row.workspaceId}, #{row.status}, #{row.storageMode}, #{row.statusVersion}, #{row.clientRequestId}, #{row.producerLinuxServerId}, #{row.executionNodeIdSnapshot}, #{row.opencodeProcessIdSnapshot}, #{row.rootRemoteSessionId}, #{row.dispatchMessageId}, #{row.assistantSummaryMessageId}, #{row.traceId}, cast(#{row.createdAt} as timestamp), cast(#{row.updatedAt} as timestamp), cast(#{row.detailsExpiresAt} as timestamp), #{row.sourceType}, #{row.sourceRefId}, #{row.triggeredByUserId}, #{row.agentId}, #{row.modelId} )) as source( run_id, session_id, workspace_id, status, storage_mode, status_version, client_request_id, producer_linux_server_id, execution_node_id_snapshot, opencode_process_id_snapshot, root_remote_session_id, dispatch_message_id, assistant_summary_message_id, trace_id, created_at, updated_at, details_expires_at, source_type, source_ref_id, triggered_by_user_id, agent_id, model_id ) on target.session_id = source.session_id and target.client_request_id = source.client_request_id when not matched then insert ( run_id, session_id, workspace_id, status, storage_mode, status_version, client_request_id, producer_linux_server_id, execution_node_id_snapshot, opencode_process_id_snapshot, root_remote_session_id, dispatch_message_id, assistant_summary_message_id, trace_id, created_at, updated_at, details_expires_at, source_type, source_ref_id, triggered_by_user_id, agent_id, model_id ) values ( source.run_id, source.session_id, source.workspace_id, source.status, source.storage_mode, source.status_version, source.client_request_id, source.producer_linux_server_id, source.execution_node_id_snapshot, source.opencode_process_id_snapshot, source.root_remote_session_id, source.dispatch_message_id, source.assistant_summary_message_id, source.trace_id, source.created_at, source.updated_at, source.details_expires_at, source.source_type, source.source_ref_id, source.triggered_by_user_id, source.agent_id, source.model_id )
mapper.select: select run_id, storage_mode, root_remote_session_id, execution_node_id_snapshot, last_remote_message_id, last_remote_part_id, details_expires_at from runs where run_id = #{runId} and storage_mode = 'REDIS_SUMMARY'
mapper.update: update runs set diff_accepted_count = coalesce(diff_accepted_count, 0) + case when #{action} = 'ACCEPTED' then 1 else 0 end, diff_rejected_count = coalesce(diff_rejected_count, 0) + case when #{action} = 'REJECTED' then 1 else 0 end where run_id = #{runId} and storage_mode = 'REDIS_SUMMARY'
mapper.insert: insert into agent_session_bindings( session_id, agent_id, remote_session_id, execution_node_id, created_at, updated_at, trace_id ) values ( #{binding.sessionId.value}, #{binding.agentId}, #{binding.remoteSessionId}, #{binding.executionNodeId.value}, #{binding.createdAt}, #{binding.updatedAt}, #{binding.traceId} ) on conflict(session_id, agent_id) do update set remote_session_id = excluded.remote_session_id, execution_node_id = excluded.execution_node_id, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, trace_id = excluded.trace_id

merge into agent_session_bindings as target using (values ( #{binding.sessionId.value}, #{binding.agentId}, #{binding.remoteSessionId}, #{binding.executionNodeId.value}, cast(#{binding.createdAt} as timestamp), cast(#{binding.updatedAt} as timestamp), #{binding.traceId} )) as source(session_id, agent_id, remote_session_id, execution_node_id, created_at, updated_at, trace_id) on target.session_id = source.session_id and target.agent_id = source.agent_id when matched then update set remote_session_id = source.remote_session_id, execution_node_id = source.execution_node_id, updated_at = source.updated_at, trace_id = source.trace_id when not matched then insert ( session_id, agent_id, remote_session_id, execution_node_id, created_at, updated_at, trace_id ) values ( source.session_id, source.agent_id, source.remote_session_id, source.execution_node_id, source.created_at, source.updated_at, source.trace_id )
mapper.update: update runs set status = #{row.status}, status_version = status_version + 1, terminal_source = #{row.terminalSource}, terminal_reason_code = #{row.terminalReasonCode}, safe_error_message = #{row.safeErrorMessage}, remote_stop_confirmed = #{row.remoteStopConfirmed}, last_event_seq = #{row.lastEventSeq}, details_expires_at = #{row.detailsExpiresAt}, root_remote_session_id = #{row.rootRemoteSessionId}, diff_proposed_count = case when coalesce(diff_proposed_count, 0) > #{row.diffProposedCount} then diff_proposed_count else #{row.diffProposedCount} end, diff_accepted_count = case when coalesce(diff_accepted_count, 0) > #{row.diffAcceptedCount} then diff_accepted_count else #{row.diffAcceptedCount} end, diff_rejected_count = case when coalesce(diff_rejected_count, 0) > #{row.diffRejectedCount} then diff_rejected_count else #{row.diffRejectedCount} end, last_remote_message_id = #{row.lastRemoteMessageId}, last_remote_part_id = #{row.lastRemotePartId}, tokens_input = #{row.tokensInput}, tokens_output = #{row.tokensOutput}, tokens_reasoning = #{row.tokensReasoning}, tokens_cache_read = #{row.tokensCacheRead}, tokens_cache_write = #{row.tokensCacheWrite}, cost_usd = #{row.costUsd}, updated_at = #{row.updatedAt} where run_id = #{row.runId} and session_id = #{row.sessionId} and storage_mode = 'REDIS_SUMMARY' and ( status_version = #{row.expectedStatusVersion} or ( status_version = #{row.expectedStatusVersion} + 1 and last_event_seq < #{row.lastEventSeq} and ( status = #{row.status} or ( status = 'FAILED' and terminal_source = 'TRANSPORT_ERROR' and #{row.terminalSource} in ('REMOTE_ROOT', 'RECOVERY_REMOTE_ROOT') ) ) ) )
mapper.select: select message_id, session_id, role, content, trace_id, created_at, run_id, agent_id, remote_message_id, updated_at, source_type, source_ref_id, sender_user_id, content_kind, summary_key, summary_version, summary_status from session_messages where run_id = #{runId} and content_kind = 'SUMMARY' order by created_at, id

select message_id, session_id, role, content, trace_id, created_at, run_id, agent_id, remote_message_id, updated_at, source_type, source_ref_id, sender_user_id, content_kind, summary_key, summary_version, summary_status from session_messages where session_id = #{sessionId} and content_kind = 'SUMMARY' order by created_at, id
